name: add_tests_go
avoid: do not test unexported functions unless necessary
brief_template:
To add tests in a Go project:
1. Create <name>_test.go in the same package or <name>_test in external package
2. Use table-driven tests with anonymous structs
3. Use t.Parallel() for independent tests
4. Mock interfaces with hand-written stubs or mockgen
5. Run 'go test ./... -race -cover'
6. Add benchmark if the function is performance-critical
